name: Potato Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a stock pot.
2. Add onion, carrot, celery, salt, and pepper to the hot oil.
3. Sauté until the vegetables are translucent.
4. Add potatoes and cover with water. Bring to a boil and cook until tender.
5. Mix milk, flour, and powdered milk together. Stir or shake until all lumps are gone.
6. Combine remaining ingredients in the pot.
7. Heat until warm.
Serving Ideas: Serve with hot buttered toast.
